summary.en-US: Automatically close idle tabs. Inbox zero for your browser.

description.en-US:
Tabs Zero brings inbox zero methodology to your browser tabs.

Features:
- Auto-expire idle tabs with configurable thresholds (15 min to 30+ days)
- Smart duplicate detection based on URL and title
- Protection for important tabs (pinned, active, playing audio)
- Close or switch to tabs directly from the popup
- Tree Style Tab integration
- Detailed stats with helpful explanations

All data is processed locally. Nothing is sent to external servers.
